title: Chatbot SaaS - Development Roadmap
summary: 14-phase product development roadmap tracking foundation, multi-tenancy, auth, LLM integration, knowledge base, widget API, lead capture, dashboards, billing, WordPress plugin, testing, and data encryption.
notes: Manifest type DOC honored. Document is authoritative roadmap tracking 14 phases with status indicators (COMPLETE, PARTIAL, IN PROGRESS, PENDING). Phase 1-11 substantially complete; Phase 12 (WordPress plugin) complete; Phase 13 (testing) partial; Phase 14 (encryption/security) pending. Document serves as single source of truth for build status and contains detailed subtasks, file locations, migration schemas, testing instructions, and debug checklists. Cross-references extensive codebase and framework configuration.
